title: AgentInfo
description: AgentInfo schema from Amazon Application Discovery Service API

hostName.description: The name of the host where the agent or collector resides.

ipAddress.description: The IP address for the host where the agent or collector resides.

macAddress.description: The MAC address for the host where the agent or collector resides.

agentNetworkInfoList.description: Network details about the host where the agent or collector resides.

health.description: The health of the agent or collector.

lastHealthPingTime.description: Time since agent or collector health was reported.

collectionStatus.description: Status of the collection process for the agent or collector.

registeredTime.description: Agent's first registration timestamp in UTC.
